title: Every time you watch EoE
wikitext:
[]: Every time you watch EoE...             Quote Post by Clover » Sun May 01, 2011 10:02 am You are being brainwashed into buying Eva figurines. SPOILER: Show

[]: Re: Every time you watch EoE...             Quote Post by Leighton » Sun May 01, 2011 10:19 am Clover wrote: You are being brainwashed into buying Eva figurines. SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by Eva Yojimbo » Sun May 01, 2011 10:19 am They didn't work very well on me...

[]:             Quote Post by C.A.P. » Sun May 01, 2011 10:26 am Miasto's picture is the only one that doesn't have its' colors inverted.

[]:             Quote Post by Shogo-Kun » Sun May 01, 2011 10:28 am Damn, thought this was gonna be a joke thread........ Oh well, might as well start now! ...EVA-01 gets a serious boner!

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Sun May 01, 2011 10:29 am Confirmed. I found one of those screen shots in there. MIND. BLOWN.

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Sun May 01, 2011 10:37 am More proof Anno wanted to surpass Tomino, even in the [s:3joziew1]BUY MORE GUNPLA[/s:3joziew1] BUY MORE BANDAGED REIS category

[]: Re: Every time you watch EoE...             Quote Post by Clover » Sun May 01, 2011 10:42 am Leighton wrote: Erm tell me if im missing something but i don't remotely see how these epileptic shots make me want to buy a figurine! (I applaud your efforts on obtaining the screen shots though) AND do you have a hi-res pic of your avatar? It always gets a maniacal laugh out of me.

[]:             Quote Post by Kendrix » Sun May 01, 2011 11:23 am The "Cup of Water" looks like Rei's beaker to me. That scene is ful of the weirdest artistic elements (blurred pictures, pictures splattered with red, pictures that appear to have been "scratched") The figurines are probably meant to be some random modern art/ other style/ different perception of the emergent hive mind - when everything is done merging, we get live action. Lol at the random "SEX". There are probably lots of such goodies to be found in that thene - eithat that, or it's from the mindrape, which also had "Sex" written across the screen a few times... Later in that sequence, there are tons of sorta undefined naked women and a scets with a chicks legs and a spiral of mentrual blood of all things... I wonder what the script says to all of this/ I'm dying to get that far with the commentary...

[]: Re: Every time you watch EoE...             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Sun May 01, 2011 11:28 am Clover wrote: Every time you watch EoE... You are being brainwashed into buying Eva figurines.

[]:             Quote Post by Kendrix » Sun May 01, 2011 11:49 am Evangelion is just full of awesomew stuff to discover. For example, if you pause at the right moments during the mind rape, you find scarily-lit doll faces, which also look like babies and illustrate Asuka's fear to become a mother. Or a mysterious full-body shot of an Elderly man - Could be her father, the one time we see him (from behind, at that!) he seems to have have had grey hair by the time Asuka was a kid. (Or is he blonde and the lighting is to blame? It's lighter than Mini!Asuka's hair so it can't be black or brown. )Must be some dirty old bastard, enough of one to fuck in the room next to his kid daughter. He might've kicked the bucket by the time of the series, explaining why only the stepmother phones Asuka. Also, sublimal ads dun work and Anno is not the person to tell u to buy merchandise. He is, however, quite the modern artist. EoE is FULL of such stuff.

[]:             Quote Post by Jayfive » Sun May 01, 2011 12:20 pm Nice find, indeed a spectuaclar find. Though anything to do with subliminal images or sounds freaks me the hell out. Even reading about supposed messages in songs played backwards gives me the willies.

[]:             Quote Post by Leighton » Sun May 01, 2011 12:22 pm But i can't see how they look like figures...

[]:             Quote Post by liquidus118 » Sun May 01, 2011 12:25 pm Jayfive wrote: Nice find, indeed a spectuaclar find. Though anything to do with subliminal images or sounds freaks me the hell out. Even reading about supposed messages in songs played backwards gives me the willies.

[]:             Quote Post by Azathoth » Sun May 01, 2011 12:43 pm Just a thought: the cup of water is from Rei's room; could it be intended to demonstrate that the sequence is part of Rei's consciousness? Light and deep water, or something like that...

[]:             Quote Post by Kendrix » Sun May 01, 2011 12:51 pm Just a thought: the cup of water is from Rei's room; could it be intended to demonstrate that the sequence is part of Rei's consciousness? Light and deep water, or something like that...

[]:             Quote Post by Azathoth » Sun May 01, 2011 1:00 pm Kendrix wrote: And what would the other images imply then? I don't think it's more than just another image from the show.

[]:             Quote Post by Kendrix » Sun May 01, 2011 1:06 pm Azathoth wrote: I don't know. The scene is spatially located inside Rei's head, however, and the length for which that particular image persists suggests to me that it's important.

[]:             Quote Post by Aozora » Sun May 01, 2011 9:22 pm Kendrix wrote: This is also from EoE: German text à la ep 22. This says "Die!" but it's aparent that they used Google translate or something. It's the "polite form" of it, more like "Would you please like to die, Miss?" I think "stirb!" (simple, old, "Die!") might've been more accurate.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Sun May 01, 2011 9:46 pm So I broke out my copy of E-Mono, and I found the exact same Misato figure. Didn't look for the others, but yeah, an actual official Evangelion figure.
summary:
[]: Every time you watch EoE...             Quote Post by Clover » Sun May 01, 2011 10:02 am You are being brainwashed into buying Eva figurines. SPOILER: Show

[]: Re: Every time you watch EoE...             Quote Post by Leighton » Sun May 01, 2011 10:19 am Clover wrote: You are being brainwashed into buying Eva figurines. SPOILER: Show

[]:        &nbsp
